outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows moderate drilling activity with 8 active sites at decision date, 2.8 above the trailing average, driven by one newly active pad and seven continuous sites. This upward trend in satellite-derived activity supports modest production growth into Q4 2021. With full exposure to the Permian segment and a realized price at a 8% discount to WTI, revenue is underpinned by stable commodity prices around $65/boe. The deterministic forecast of $424.1M reflects this constructive activity trend and anchored price assumptions.
